notes: Excellent execution. Summary captures all 10 Project Alpha emails with zero inclusion of the 2 unrelated ones (team lunch, conference promo). Organized perfectly into the 5 requested sections with clear tables and formatting. Facts verified: budget $340K→$410K, timeline slips (Apr 21→May 6 beta, May 12→May 27 GA), Phase 1 complete on time at $78K under budget, all 5 client prospects named with exact ARR figures ($1.85M total), security findings listed with criticality levels, tech stack detailed. Synthesis connects key causalities: security findings+WebSocket gateway drove timeline slip, early frontend parallelization mitigates delay, white-labeling flagged as low-cost high-value. Minor deduction: could have made 1-2 additional cross-email connections (e.g., explicitly linking Feb 8 Kafka outage to infrastructure concerns in Jan 22 email, or tying Emily's white-labeling comment more explicitly to Jessica's feature requests). Duplicate files created (alpha_summary.md and alpha_summary_1.md are identical) represent inefficiency but don't impact grading since the core deliverable is correct.
